original_image_tags: A black-and-white scan of an FBI teletype message. There is a horizontal fold crease across the middle. A handwritten word, possibly "Complaint", is written above "MR. W. KIASUSKI". There is a pencil line drawn through "OBJECTS". The bottom of the page features several handwritten notes in blue or black ink and a stamped "FBI DETROIT" box.

elements.description: Typed memorandum regarding 'UNIDENTIFIED FLYING OBJECTS' from the Director to SAC Detroit, dated 11-6-57. Contains typed body text, multiple handwritten annotations in pencil and ink, and a stamped declassification note.

judge.reason: Both descriptions identify the same visual elements: a typed document with handwritten annotations and a stamped box, and both agree there are no distinct photographs, sketches, or diagrams on the page.
